EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IXYEvent2FieldsProperties

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that define the fields needed to create an XY event layer. A minimum of two fields (X and Y) are required.

[Guid("71045C9E-7902-11D4-9FE5-00C04F6BDF06")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IXYEvent2FieldsProperties : IXYEventProperties

Properties

XFieldName

The name of the X field.

string XFieldName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

YFieldName

The name of the Y field.

string YFieldName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ZFieldName

The name of the Z field (optional).

string ZFieldName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet
